title: dalbergia sericea
intro: Dalbergia sericea, also known as black palisander, is a species of legume tree native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Fabaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, derived from its resinous wood and leaves. The medicinal properties of Dalbergia sericea have been shown to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and coughs. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, including decoctions, infusions, and extracts, to create remedies for various ailments.
